{"code":"(def incidents (pagerduty__list_incidents {:status "triggered" :urgency "high"}))
(def triggered-high-count (count incidents))
(def triggered-high-ids (map :id incidents))
{:count triggered-high-count :ids triggered-high-ids}"}
